scope: Add IntegratedSmpPreemptionCleanupRecord as first-class integrated scenario evidence
Tie existing SMP stress, timer preemption, saved context, remote preempt, activation cleanup, and SMP cleanup quiescence evidence together
Require exact generations for every referenced object
Emit IntegratedSmpPreemptionCleanupRecorded event and stable osctl ViewV1 JSON
Expose historical graph edges without creating live ownership or target-executor Activation edges
Publish cleanup target-store tombstone evidence so historical store generation references validate
no_goals: real cross-hart IPI or timer interrupt delivery

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: X0 SMP + preemption + cleanup integrated scenario
all integrated scenario references carry kind/id/generation
integrated scenario uses Historical graph edges and tombstones for dead store generations
completed cleanup proves wait cancellation, activation death, and store generation advance
osctl exposes stable ViewV1 JSON and contract validation output

findings_fixed: target_executor harness now references the restored saved-context generation that actually exists in the semantic graph
osctl ViewV1 no longer exposes runtime preemptive activation as target-executor Activation ObjectRef
history graph no longer creates integrated-cleanup-activation edge
cleanup target store generation is represented by tombstone evidence so historical edges validate
osctl command and inspect dispatch expose integrated-smp-preemption-cleanup JSON
bad_smells_checked: No real SMP execution is claimed by the integrated record
No substrate mapping or adapter state became semantic truth
No third-party scheduler or runtime dependency was introduced
osctl emits stable ViewV1 JSON rather than internal Rust structs
Integrated evidence remains a small closed X0 object instead of a broad runtime refactor
residual_notes: X1 owns network driver fault under SMP
Future real SMP runtime must replace semantic evidence with substrate-backed event sources without changing semantic object identity
A dedicated runtime activation ObjectKind can replace the metadata-only runtime_activation field if the contract language grows one

validation_commands.command: cargo check -p semantic_core -p contract_core -p target_executor -p osctl

residual_gaps: X1 owns network driver fault under SMP
X2 owns disk pending IO fault under preemption
Real SMP runtime must later provide substrate-backed timer/IPI event evidence
